source_presidential.name: US County Level Presidential Election Results 2008-2024

notes.2020: Scraped from Fox News, Politico, and New York Times

voter_registration.note: Michigan does not have party registration. County-level total registered voter counts are published quarterly by the MI Secretary of State at mvic.sos.state.mi.us/VoterCount, but the site uses Cloudflare anti-bot protection that blocks automated access.
voter_registration.statewide_registered_source: Michigan Secretary of State, 2024 General Election
